# INGetRestaurantGuestIntentResponseCode.failure

**Case**

You were unable to return information about the guest.

## Declaration

```swift
case failure
```

## Discussion

Use this code if you encounter any errors when trying to return the guest information.

## Constants

- **INGetRestaurantGuestIntentResponseCode.success**: You successfully handled the intent.
